zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Cheyne於1388年出生在英國肯特易亞斯丘其時，他的父親Richard Cheyne35歲，母親Margaret de Cralle33歲。他和Eleanor Nottingham至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1455年在英國素可瓦布萊頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國素可瓦布萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Cheyne was born in 1388, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, his father, Richard Cheyne, was 35 and his mother, Margaret de Cralle, was 33. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Eleanor Nottingham. He died in 1455, in Warbleton, Sussex, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Warbleton, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Cheyneが1388年にイギリスケントエアストチャーチで生まれた時，父Richard Cheyneは35歳，母Margaret de Cralleは33歳であった。彼はEleanor Nottinghamとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1455年にイギリススセックスワーブレトンで67歳で死去し，イギリススセックスワーブレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, En: 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Simon Cheyne(이)가 1388년 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Cheyne(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Cralle(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Eleanor Nottingham(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 영국 수세스 워블레턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 워블레턴에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Eleanor Nottingham. Ele faleceu em 1455, em Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, En: алл сеинц' чурч, эасчурч, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Cheyne родился в 1388 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Cheyne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Cralle, 33. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Eleanor Nottingham. Он умер в 1455 г. в местности варблетон, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности варблетон, суссекс, Англия.
